I absolutely think this game is very fun. At first it can be challenging until you get used to the controls and physics of the game but after you do then its really fun to play. Has lots of gore with its cartoon type graphics and a lot of different levels. Im looking forward to playing GORN 2 now.

Holy hell i just finished the game and the movement may be janky but it makes it feel much more unique, the combat is PERFECT gore snd other parts are amazing too, the crab leveñ was difficult but SOO fun. 10/10 i highly recomend buying.

It’s a fun little game, if you don’t take it too seriously it’s a fun game you can turn your brain off to and enjoy. Yeah it can be a bit janky but it has its charm. If you want a realistic gladiator sim then this isn’t for you.  One of my first vr games I’ve played but had a blast
10/10 Game very fun to defeat bosses haven't finished yet 2 more bosses to go hopefully I can beat them!

This game is really fun and actually a good game unlike others in this game you go on a trial fighting rokibe or (humans) and the king makes you go through multiple trials to prove you are a worthy warrior and I don't want to spoil too much but overall this game is amazing

Don't listen to the one star people they js don't understand how to play the game when it's simple-kill everything in ridiculously gory ways. Awesome game.

The game is honestly terrible. In videos, it looked amazing, but when I actually got the game it was lacking story severely. The movement sucks as its hard to hit enemies while moving, the weapons wobble for some reason, making them absolutely terrible. A single hit causes you to start dying unless you kill an enemy, which is hard if they're being launched back at the slightest hit. Game felt too easy even with the launching problem, and I finished it in 30 minutes. Don't buy it
Peak game. Peak gameplay. Custom mode is fun. The game overall is fun. And bashing with the two handed hammer is funny

reviews.review_title: This is the game that got me hooked
reviews.review_description:
Although it has a couple issues like the npc’s walk like infants and it’s really easy to get them to kill each other or to do something stupid I think that’s what makes the game so enjoyable and entertaining to play 

It’s an instant classic that everyone should try at least once

I can’t help but love how this game makes you go through the whole thing to reach the end of it. I have another game, blade and sorcery that just lets you skip through the entire thing if you want to and I feel that too many people use that because I’m one of them. (P.s. my shoulder hurts from flailing my arms around but best arena game I’ve seen.)

(Just save another $10 to $20￼ for blade and sorcery or BoneLab or if ur on quest 3/3S/PC just buy BoneWorks.)



BTW 100% this game seems easy but one of the objectives ￼has u Parry 10 attacks but only gives you around 15 to 20 NPC on top of that they fight each other so good luck with clunky parry￼s and there 4 out of like 9 NPC that you physically can’t parry, 2 of the 4 are close to impossible, 1 out of the 4 u cant parry and the other 1 u can parry but the ķǐłł doesn’t count towards the objectives

Reviewers have this game wrong! This game is great fun and has incredible melee combat, the issue is many think of this game in a similar vein to the likes of boneworks. It is completely different. Once you can get that I hope you can have hours of fun just as I have done!

reviews.review_title: The greatest game I’ve ever played
reviews.review_description: I play this game to this game and I still enjoy it. I usually mess around in it but sometimes when I’m having a terrible or rough day, I hop on this game and go into endless to release and anger I got from the day or bored. I mostly use this game as a way to release stress and it works really well.
This game is the only reason I’m keeping my Quest 1, it’s the only game I can play on it besides gorilla tag

reviews.review_title: Yah, this game is the G.O.A.T.
reviews.review_description: This game is great to release anger, or anything, maybe just for fun, what makes this game so fun is the physics and the story and the modifiers, it’s so fun to just beat up dudes, not in a bad way, of course not, I’m young bro, can’t wait for the 2nd one, Gorn 2, it’ll looks so much more cartoony and fun, it also looks pretty funny.
This is the best friend game I've ever played I love the goofy effects and I heard there's a new game so I recommend using this got both entertainment and releasing anger.
but it’s significantly worse and better at the same time

Gorn is peak vr gladiator games. With its cartoonish art style , humor that mainly involves insulting the player and janky physics that make really fun situations it is easily the best game for this genre. The best part about the game is that it doesn’t really take it self the seriously most the time making it all the better.
I have had this game for about 3-4 years and I just played gorn 2 and I love the cartoony art style and altimas soo good thanks for these games

This game is really fun it has features such as boxing and just playing w whatever swords / weapons you want once you finish the base story of this game going to custom mode is insanely fun in my opinion I recommend buying this game while sale is still on
One of the if not the most fun Vr game I’ve ever played

This game is so fun to play the boss are so cool

I beat the game and I still love to play it.    Suggestion add more stuff to to the enemies like their bones can break and then the limb will go limp. Please add a whip as a weapon and make a hand were you can shrink and burrow into enemies and hit them from the inside and a hand that can combine weapons or a hand were you can store one weapon in your hand and use it like the claws and be able to take it out and use it.Would give gorn 100 stars if I could.

reviews.review_title: Gorn is super fun and very violent.
reviews.review_description: Gorn is super fun with violent ways to kill the other gladiators but even though it came out 4 years ago on the meta quest 2 the graphics still look amazing. There are 4 rooms on each 3 levels that you can fight the most weirdest bosses like a tiny guy riding a big crab, and a guy with badgers on 2 of his his arms and they can stop you from moving making you a easy target to hit and many more bosses. They have 2 rooms that can never stop 1 is called endless and the other is custom, custom is where you can choose different weapon hands and so much more. The developers who made this game they a making a Gorns 2 coming soon on meta quest 2 and a can’t wait for it to come out.
So bloody and gore gladiator game, so cool there is gorn2
